title: TruthStateNormalizationPlan
description: Phased plan for implementing TruthEvent/StateEvent schema without modifying existing business logic. Each phase is additive -- no existing code changes required until Phase 5.

phases.name: Wrapper / Adapter Layer (Read-Only Observation)
phases.goal: Add TruthEvent/StateEvent wrappers around existing governance_bridge.record_outcome() without modifying the original function. Create classification layer that existing code does not see.
deliverables: actual_value / predicted_value extraction from outcome_record fields

specific_operations.description: Wraps governance_bridge.record_outcome(). Receives raw outcome_type+actual_result+predicted_result+context. Maps to TruthEvent schema. Classifies truth_type/truth_track. Does NOT call original record_outcome -- wraps it.
Wraps queue/gateway/M04/RTCM state change callbacks. Maps state transitions to StateEvent schema. Links related TruthEvent via related_truth_event_id.
Handles semantic conflicts: actual field type分歧 (1.0/0.0 vs 0.95/0.2), predicted null handling, field name collisions (status/execution_stage/filter_result).

TruthEventWrapper extracts governance_trace_id from context.context_envelope (R240-4 ContextEnvelope). Populates TruthEvent.governance_trace_id. Currently governance_trace_id is NOT in any outcome_record -- this gap is closed at wrapper layer without modifying governance_bridge.

tests: Unit tests for TruthEventWrapper: all 14 outcome_types produce correct truth_type/truth_track
Unit tests for OutcomeContractMapper: actual field type分歧 resolved correctly
Integration test: TruthEvent produced for sandbox_execution_result has governance_trace_id populated
unblocks: Mode Router can now consume TruthEventWrapper for truth classification

phases.name: Governance Outcome TruthEvent Envelope
phases.goal: Add optional truth_type/truth_track/truth_event_id fields to outcome_record structure. Migrate actual/predicted hardcoded values. This is additive -- existing fields remain.

specific_operations.issue: nightly_evolution actual=1.0 and predicted=0.9 are HARDCODED
specific_operations.fix: Add truth_type='observation_signal' to outcome_record. actual/predicted remain as-is for backwards compat. TruthEventWrapper sees the truth_type and ignores hardcoded values.
truth_type='predicted_outcome', actual_value=null (not hardcoded 1.0). TruthEventWrapper propagates candidate.predicted_value to predicted_value.
truth_type='observation_signal'. Individual candidate outcomes come separately via upgrade_center_execution_result.
truth_type='state_snapshot'. Migrate from TruthEvent to StateEvent. Phase 2 produces both for compatibility.

schema_changes.change: outcome_record gains optional fields: truth_type, truth_track, truth_event_id

tests: Verify existing consumers (DPBS, M08, UC) still work with added fields
TruthEventWrapper tests pass with new truth_type field

phases.name: UC Sandbox Predicted-Actual Alignment
phases.goal: Ensure predicted_value from UC TieredCandidate is explicitly propagated through QueueConsumer to sandbox_execution_result

specific_operations.issue: sandbox_execution_result predicted comes from task.predicted but source is opaque
specific_operations.fix: In QueueManager (TypeScript), ensure ExperimentTask.predicted is populated from TieredCandidate.predicted_value. Document the chain: U6 ApprovalTierClassifier -> TieredCandidate.predicted_value -> ExperimentTask.predicted -> task.predicted -> QueueConsumer task.predicted -> governance predicted

specific_operations.issue: UC experiment_pool.json and approval_backlog.json are predicted state without explicit predicted_value field
specific_operations.fix: Add truth_event_id to ExperimentTask in experiment_pool.json. This ID tracks the candidate from UC prediction through execution to governance outcome.

specific_operations.issue: execution_status=success but queue task.status=completed are conflated
specific_operations.fix: Phase 3 adds execution_status to StateEvent for sandbox. StateEventWrapper classifies: task.status (queue state) vs execution_status (truth).

tests: Verify predicted_value from U6 TieredCandidate reaches sandbox_execution_result.predicted
StateEvent shows task.status (queue) and execution_status (truth) as separate events

phases.name: RTCM / Asset / Memory / Prompt Integration
phases.goal: Add missing truth_type coverage for RTCM verdict, memory update, and prompt optimization

specific_operations.issue: final_report.acceptance_recommendation is not written to governance
specific_operations.fix: New outcome_type: rtcm_verdict, truth_type=approval_decision, truth_track=rtcm_truth. Written when project ARCHIVED.

specific_operations.issue: NightlyDistiller computes avg_quality but not written as governance outcome
specific_operations.fix: New outcome_type: asset_quality_signal, truth_type=asset_quality_signal, truth_track=asset_truth. Written by NightlyDistiller._run_stage4().

specific_operations.issue: MemoryUpdater does not write governance outcome
specific_operations.fix: Optional: New outcome_type: memory_update_signal, truth_type=state_update, truth_track=memory_truth. OR explicitly document Memory as pure state with no truth integration.
specific_operations.decision_required: Does memory update need governance integration?

specific_operations.issue: Optimizer.optimize() is stub -- no actual optimization
specific_operations.fix: Postpone. Optimizer implementation required before defining truth_type.

tests: RTCM project archival produces rtcm_verdict TruthEvent
Memory update: decision documented (truth integration or pure state)

phases.name: Mode Router Safe Consumption
phases.goal: Mode Router consumes TruthEvent/StateEvent from wrapper layer. Implements mode switching based on truth_state and state_transition rules

specific_operations.description: Mode Router reads from TruthEventWrapper (Phase 1) -- NOT directly from governance_state.json. All truth classification already done.
MemoryMiddleware updated to read memory_scope from ContextEnvelope. QdrantStorage updated to filter by ModeStateScope, not just agent_name. Memory scope enforced at storage layer.
specific_operations.note: This is R240-7 -- separate from this phase but required before Phase 5

specific_operations.description: rtcm_session_id added to ContextEnvelope. ModeDecision tracks RTCM state. MainChatMode state visible to Mode Router.
specific_operations.note: This is R240-8 -- separate from this phase but required before Phase 5

success_rate_computation.formula: success_rate = count(truth_type=actual_outcome AND actual_value=1.0) / count(truth_type=actual_outcome AND predicted_value IS NOT NULL)

blocking_issues_for_immediate_mode_route.description: sandbox_execution_result.actual=1.0/0.0 (binary truth) vs tool_execution_uef.actual=0.95/0.2 (quality signal) -- same field, different semantics
blocking_issues_for_immediate_mode_route.blocks: Mode Router cannot reliably compute binary success/failure

blocking_issues_for_immediate_mode_route.description: nightly_evolution.actual=1.0, upgrade_center_approval.actual=1.0 (hardcoded, meaningless). If Mode Router sees these as truth, success_rate is inflated.
Mode Router cannot trace governance outcome back to original OrchestrationRequest without governance_trace_id
nightly_evolution and queue_health_signal enter governance but are not marked as observation. Mode Router might include them in success_rate.
task.status=completed != execution_status=success. Mode Router might use wrong state for decisions.

what_phase_1_unblocks: Mode Router can consume TruthEventWrapper and correctly classify all 14 outcome_types
Mode Router can distinguish actual_outcome from observation_signal
actual_value (1.0/0.0 binary) vs result_quality (0.95/0.2) confusion resolved at wrapper layer
hardcoded 1.0 actual values are ignored for truth purposes
